info.description: Uses the result set from another panel in the same dashboard
A built-in data source that generates random walk data and can poll the Testdata data source. This helps you test visualizations and run experiments.
Lets you query multiple data sources in the same panel.
Shows list of alerts and their current status
Graphical representation of price movements of a security, derivative, or currency.
List of dynamic links to other dashboards
Distribution of values presented as a bar chart.
The new core pie chart visualization
Time based line, area and bar charts
Like timeseries, but when x != time
Supports arbitrary X vs Y in a graph to visualize the relationship between two variables.
